description: Wasm baseline compiler missing dead-code check in BaseCompiler::emitTableFill. Sec-high (csectype-bounds). When table.fill appears in dead code (after an unreachable), the baseline compiler still consumed operands from the wasm value stack, violating the numval <= stk_.length() invariant and tripping MOZ_RELEASE_ASSERT. Fix (commit 5a54e992206bf047493b1081886b364fe21837d7 'Bug 1908631: Add missing dead code check in table.fill' by Ben Visness, 2024-07-22, r=rhunt) adds the deadCode_ early-return that all other table-* opcodes already had. Test commit c3216db173b3631a656a2feb519f572b6837489a ships js/src/jit-test/tests/wasm/bug1908631.js. Reporter: Christian Holler (:decoder).

fixes.description: Bug 1908631: Add missing dead code check in table.fill.
Bug 1908631: Add test for dead code in table.fill. r=rhunt
